name: Nancy's Best Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 packages (8 oz each) cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients and cut in butter until well mixed. Add egg yolk and vanilla and blend thoroughly.
2. Dust fingers with flour and pat dough onto the bottom and about 1 inch up the sides of a 10-inch cheesecake pan (I use a 10-inch Kaiser springform pan with a non-stick finish).
3. Filling:
- Beat cream cheese in a large mixing bowl until smooth and creamy.
- Combine dry ingredients; stir into cream cheese mixture. Add eggs and beat just until combined (do not overbeat). Stir in the chocolate, sour cream, and vanilla, mixing until combined. Pour into crust-lined pan.
- Bake at 325 degrees for 60-70 minutes or until center appears set or cracks. Remove from oven and cool for 15 minutes. Run a spatula around the edge of the pan to loosen the cheesecake. Cool for an additional 30 minutes. Remove sides of the pan, cover, and chill for at least 2 hours.
4. Top:
- Melt semi-sweet chocolate and butter. Drizzle in a lattice design on top of the cheesecake. Chill until set.
Makes 12 servings. Store in refrigerator.
